zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Gerard of Bryn於大約1381年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊恩時，他的父親Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn23歲，母親Mrs Matilda Gerard19歲。他於1402年4月5日之前與Alice Boteler在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1431年11月6日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Gerard of Bryn于大约1381年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊恩时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn23岁，母亲Mrs Matilda Gerard19岁。他于1402年4月5日之前与Alice Boteler在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1431年11月6日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

variants.name: Gerardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Enzo, Gaspare, Luigi, Rocco, Antonio, Canio, Carmine, Filippo, Francesco, Giovanni, Libero.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the ancient Germanic personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ). This surname is also found in southern France.
German and French (mainly Nord): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name German Gerhard , French Gérard (see Gerard ), using the genitive of the Latinized form Gerardus.

variants.name: Garrison
meanings: English: from a shortened form of Middle English Gerardson, a patronymic from the personal name Gerard + son, or an Anglicized form of its Dutch cognate Gerritsen . The English surname is probably in most cases of Flemish or Dutch origin. It was brought to Britain by immigrants from the Low Countries, especially in the 15th and 16th centuries.
Americanized form of Jewish   Gerson   (see   Gershon  ).
Americanized form of Dutch   Gerritsen  .

variants.name: Garrard
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
Altered form of French Gérard (see Gerard ).
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Geenen
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Geen, a pet form of Gerard .

variants.name: Gerardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Alberto, Alfredo, Aurelio, Carlos, Jesus, Juan, Norberto, Ramon, Tomas, Ana.  Italian Antonio, Carmine, Dino, Enrico, Marco, Marco Antonio.
Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Gerardo (see Gerard ).

variants.name: Gerald
meanings: English (of Norman origin); French (Gérald): from the ancient Germanic personal name Gerald, Girald, composed of the elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ and wald ‘power, authority’. It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was fairly common, but less so than Gerard , with which it was early confused. In France the much more common variants of this surname are Géraud and Giraud .

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: English: variant of   Gerard  .

variants.name: Geron
meanings: French (Géron): from the personal name Gero, Gerone, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with the element gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, as for example Gérard (see Gerard ).
Altered form of French Guérin (see Guerin ).
English (Lancashire): of Norman origin, from the personal name Geron of ancient Germanic origin, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gherardi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Silvio, Alessandro, Angelo, Antonio, Donato, Egidio, Ennio, Enzo, Gildo, Lucio, Luigi, Primo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Gherardo, one of themany Italian equivalents of Gerard .

variants.name: Garard
meanings: English (London and Buckinghamshire): variant of   Gerard  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Gerard of Bryn was born about 1381, in Bryn, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn, was 23 and his mother, Mrs Matilda Gerard, was 19. He married Alice Boteler before 5 April 1402, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 6 November 1431, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Gerard of Bryn est né environ 1381, à Bryn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs Matilda Gerard, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Boteler avant 5 avril 1402, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1431, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Gerard of Bryn um 1381 in Bryn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn 23 und seine Mutter Mrs Matilda Gerard 19. Er hat vor 5. April 1402 in Lancashire, England Alice Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1431 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gerard of Bryn è nato il circa 1381 nel Bryn, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Matilda Gerard, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Boteler prima del 5 aprile 1402, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1431, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Gerard of Brynが約1381年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Gerard of Brynは23歳，母Mrs Matilda Gerardは19歳であった。1402年4月5日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでAlice Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年11月6日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Gerard of Bryn(이)가 대략 1381년 영국 랭카실르 브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Matilda Gerard(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1402년 4월 5일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Alice Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 11월 6일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Gerard of Bryn nasceu aproximadamente 1381, em Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Matilda Gerard, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Boteler antes 5 de abril de 1402, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1431, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Gerard of Bryn родился около 1381 г. в местности брин, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Matilda Gerard, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Boteler перед 5 апрель 1402 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1431 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Gerard of Bryn nació aproximadamente 1381, en Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Gerard of Bryn, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs Matilda Gerard, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Boteler antes de 5 de abril de 1402, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1431, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
